intro: Rinorea horsfieldii, also known as the Chinese goldthread, is a plant species in the family Violaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Rinorea horsfieldii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Rinorea horsfieldii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is commonly used to treat colds, flu, and other upper respiratory infections.
